AC-1.description: useConversations exists → Delete hook → No file exists

AC-2.description: Component needs conversations → Use useQuery → List loads reactively
AC-2.evidence: app/(drawer)/_layout.tsx and app/(drawer)/chat/[conversationId].tsx now use useQuery(api.conversations.list) directly

AC-3.description: User creates conversation → Call useMutation → Conversation created, list updates
AC-3.evidence: Components use useMutation(api.conversations.create) for lazy conversation creation

AC-4.description: User deletes conversation → Call useMutation → Conversation removed, list updates
AC-4.evidence: Components use useMutation(api.conversations.remove) for deletion with automatic list updates via Convex reactivity

deleted: hooks/useConversations.ts - Removed React Query + Supabase wrapper hook
modified: app/(drawer)/_layout.tsx - Now uses Convex useQuery/useMutation directly
app/(drawer)/chat/[conversationId].tsx - Now uses Convex useQuery/useMutation directly

pattern_applied.name: Direct Convex Usage
pattern_applied.description: Components use Convex hooks directly instead of wrapper hooks
benefits: Simpler code with fewer abstraction layers

test_results.note: Test failures are pre-existing (US-052 chat tests and ResearchProgress test) and not related to US-056 changes
